name: [DICT-03/05/06] Add deterministic dictation generation, exit, and completion coverage
description: DICT-03/05/06 need deterministic coverage for Surprise Me generation, exit modal behavior, and completion/review recovery.
acceptanceCriteria: Add deterministic coverage for DICT-03/05/06. DICT-03: controlled browser or unit coverage presses dictation-surprise, returns fixed generated sentences, and proves playback data handoff/navigation; timeout/cancel late-response guards remain covered. DICT-05: visible Exit and hardware-back both reach the in-app dictation-exit-confirm modal; confirm navigates to practice and cancel stays in session. DICT-06: complete-done posts /v1/dictation/result with session completionKey, reviewed:false, and sentence count, then returns to practice; complete-check-writing covers review spinner, cancel, 20s timeout UI, late-response suppression, and missing-context dictation-complete-missing-data with no 0-sentence POST. Variants: Surprise Me success; generation timeout/cancel late response; visible Exit; hardware back; modal confirm/cancel; done/result POST; review spinner/cancel/timeout; late review response; stale/missing context. Expected files include a controlled dictation Chrome spec if useful, playback.test.tsx for BackHandler, complete.test.tsx for stale context/result-practice assertions, and docs citing native camera/gallery boundaries.
riskImpact: P0 dictation coverage gap: V2 dictation entry, exit, and completion recovery can regress outside the current controlled browser evidence.
